name: Shipley, Smalley, Mapperley, Horsley and Horlsey Woodhouse

locations.name: ripley

Ripley,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Shipley, Smalley, Mapperley, Horsley, Horsley Woodhouse and Coxbench. It belongs to the Amber Valley Local Policing Unit. 
The area also encompasses Shipley Country Park. It is located in the Amber Valley Borough Council area but borders on the Erewash Borough Council area. It is predominantly a rural location situated between the towns of Ilkeston and Heanor.
